Home / Services / Furnace Repair

Furnace Repair

Fast, reliable furnace repair services to keep your Philadelphia home warm all winter.

When the Philadelphia winter hits, a functioning furnace isn't a luxury – it's a necessity. BI-TI Heating & Cooling provides comprehensive furnace repair services to get your system back up and running quickly. Our experienced technicians are familiar with all types of furnaces, from older models found in historic row houses to modern, high-efficiency units.

We start with a thorough diagnosis to identify the root cause of the problem. Whether it's a faulty igniter, a broken blower motor, or a gas leak, we'll explain the issue clearly and provide you with a transparent estimate for the repair. We use only quality replacement parts to ensure lasting performance and safety.

Our team understands the urgency of furnace repairs, especially during freezing temperatures. That's why we offer 24/7 emergency service to address critical heating issues promptly. Don't suffer through another cold night – call BI-TI Heating & Cooling for reliable furnace repair you can count on.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Schedule an appointment online or by phone.
  2. 02 Step 2: A certified technician will diagnose your furnace issue.
  3. 03 Step 3: Receive a detailed estimate for the repair.
  4. 04 Step 4: We perform the repair using quality parts.

Benefits

  • Fast and reliable service
  • Experienced and certified technicians
  • Upfront pricing with no hidden fees
  • 24/7 emergency availability

Frequently Asked Questions

How quickly can you repair my furnace?

We offer same-day service for many furnace repairs. Our technicians arrive prepared with the tools and parts needed to diagnose and fix most common issues on the spot.

What are the signs that my furnace needs repair?

Common signs include unusual noises, inconsistent heating, a yellow pilot light, and a sudden increase in your energy bills. If you notice any of these issues, it's best to call for a professional inspection.

Do you offer furnace maintenance services?

Yes, we offer comprehensive furnace maintenance services to keep your system running efficiently and prevent costly repairs. Regular maintenance can extend the life of your furnace and improve its performance.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with furnace repair? Contact us today.
